subject: Fermi GBM trigger 521905898/170716577 is not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (UAH) reports on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

���The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 521905898/170716577
at 13:51:33.74 UT on 16 July 2017, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."

-- 
Rachel Hamburg
Fermi GBM Graduate Research Assistant
University of Alabama in Huntsville
Space Science Department
